headline: Assessing Equifax (EFX) Valuation After Mixed Recent Returns And Premium P/E Multiple
summary: What recent returns imply about Equifax (EFX) Equifax (EFX) has had mixed share performance recently, with a 1 day return of 1.5% and 6.1% over the past week, against declines over the past month, past 3 months and year to date. Over a longer horizon, the stock shows a 12 month total return of a 12.4% decline, about a 5.1% decline over 3 years and a 1.8% total return over 5 years, giving investors a broad view of past share price and dividend outcomes.
